markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 4
### Chapter 69. Jefferson & Orange Cnty. Pilots Licensing and Regul. Act
##### § 69.001 — Short Title

This chapter may be cited as the Jefferson and Orange County Pilots Licensing and Regulatory Act.

*Amended by Acts 2003, 78th Leg., ch. 745, Sec. 1, eff. June 20, 2003.*

subsections.text: This chapter may be cited as the Jefferson and Orange County Pilots Licensing and Regulatory Act.

history.raw: Amended by Acts 2003, 78th Leg., ch. 745, Sec. 1, eff. June 20, 2003.
